if.test: searchValue != null and searchValue != '' and searchTypes != null and searchTypes != ''

where.if: AND (1=0 OR d.dept_nm ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR d.dept_code ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' )

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND d.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND d.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT d.dept_id, d.parent_dept_id, d.dept_nm, d.sort_ord FROM shopjoy_2604.sy_dept d ORDER BY d.sort_ord ASC, d.dept_id ASC

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyDept :: selectById */ d.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , usr.user_nm AS manager_nm , cd_dt.code_label AS dept_type_cd_nm FROM shopjoy_2604.sy_dept d LEFT JOIN shopjoy_2604.sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = d.site_id LEFT JOIN shopjoy_2604.sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = d.manager_id LEFT JOIN shopjoy_2604.sy_code cd_dt ON cd_dt.code_grp = 'DEPT_TYPE' AND cd_dt.code_value = d.dept_type_cd WHERE d.dept_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyDept :: selectList */ d.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , usr.user_nm AS manager_nm , cd_dt.code_label AS dept_type_cd_nm FROM shopjoy_2604.sy_dept d LEFT JOIN shopjoy_2604.sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = d.site_id LEFT JOIN shopjoy_2604.sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = d.manager_id LEFT JOIN shopjoy_2604.sy_code cd_dt ON cd_dt.code_grp = 'DEPT_TYPE' AND cd_dt.code_value = d.dept_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyDept :: selectPageList */ d.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , usr.user_nm AS manager_nm , cd_dt.code_label AS dept_type_cd_nm FROM shopjoy_2604.sy_dept d LEFT JOIN shopjoy_2604.sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = d.site_id LEFT JOIN shopjoy_2604.sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = d.manager_id LEFT JOIN shopjoy_2604.sy_code cd_dt ON cd_dt.code_grp = 'DEPT_TYPE' AND cd_dt.code_value = d.dept_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(d.*) /* base.sy :: SyDept :: selectPageCount */ FROM shopjoy_2604.sy_dept d
